{{Infobox artifact
| name = Silent Core
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Silent Core]] is located beneath [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The eastern chamber has been influenced by the [[Silent Core]] for hundreds of years.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Silent Core]] is a purple-white core.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
